file-5f323f52e3e3d.png.alt: Firefox displaying a Potential Security Risk warning when visiting the HTTPS site before trusting the certificate authority.
ocr: Warning: Potential Security Risk Ahead Firefox detected potential security threat and did not continue to 192.168.90.10. If you visit this site; attackers could try to steal information like your passwords_ emails; or credit card details
What can you do about it? The issue is most likely with the website, and there is nothing you can do to resolve it:
If you are on corporate network or using anti-virus software, you can reach out to the support teams for assistance: You can also notify the website's administrator bout the problem:
Websites prove their identity via certificates Firefox does not trust this site because it uses a certificate that is not valid for 192.168.90.10.
